scripts.build: npm run build --prefix FreeLine-Backend && npm run build --prefix apps/admin && bash scripts/check-structure.sh
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix FreeLine-Backend && npm run lint --prefix apps/admin && bash scripts/check-structure.sh
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix FreeLine-Backend && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/admin && bash scripts/check-structure.sh
